creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
This patch updates deskutils/notecase to v1.9.3. It integrates parts of a patch I have submitted upstream (patch-Makefile) + the following :

(from changelog)
2008/06/23 - NoteCase v1.9.3 released (bugfixes, major speedup when loading documents)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
